identity.name: Rushendra Nuthi
identity.tagline: Backend & security engineer building Python APIs, security tooling, and AI-powered products.

bio: Security-focused backend engineer and postgraduate student in Computer Networks and Information Security, with experience across Python APIs, security tooling, AI-powered products, and full-stack application development.

My work includes production-oriented healthcare integrations, threat intelligence automation, local AI interfaces, and credential detection systems. I care about building software that is secure, scalable, and maintainable.

experience.title: Software Developer Intern
experience.details: Backend engineering and system integration for AI-enabled healthcare software — building Python/FastAPI services, integration logic, and validation flows across Cerbo EMR and AI-assisted recommendation pipelines.

experience.title: M.Tech in Computer Networks and Information Security
experience.organization: JNTUH - University College of Engineering, Science and Technology

projects.title: LeakLens
projects.description: A local-first credential vulnerability scanner for codebases and repositories. It flags exposed secrets while keeping analysis fully private to the developer's machine.
contributions: Built a layered detection pipeline combining regex pattern matching, entropy-based checks, and ML-assisted classification to catch exposed credentials.
Designed a local-first architecture so scanning happens entirely on the developer's machine, preserving privacy.
Implemented high-entropy string flagging to surface secrets that signature-only rules miss, with a focus on false-positive reduction.

projects.title: CVScriptly-AI: AI-Powered ATS Resume Builder
projects.description: A privacy-first, browser-based AI resume builder with ATS-optimized templates, real-time preview, and multi-format export.
contributions: Developed a responsive front end using Next.js and Tailwind CSS with real-time editing and preview.
Integrated AI-powered generation (Genkit) to auto-draft resume content and ensure strong ATS compatibility.
Implemented robust export to PDF and LaTeX, keeping processing browser-side, and deployed on Netlify.

projects.title: Cognito: Automated Threat Intelligence Platform
projects.description: A Flask-based security tool that automates risk assessment for digital indicators, centralizing intelligence from multiple industry-standard APIs into a single consolidated security score.
contributions: Engineered a Flask application integrating VirusTotal, AbuseIPDB, and IPQualityScore APIs for automated risk scoring of URLs, IPs, hashes, and email headers.
Reduced manual analysis and triage time by 60%, improving classification efficiency and accuracy.
Used LLMs and prompt engineering to auto-generate analysis modules and threat reports, accelerating development by 40%.

projects.title: ChayaLM: Local AI Chat Interface
projects.description: A local AI chat interface for Ollama-style models that makes private LLM interaction simple and configurable, delivering a cloud-like experience entirely on-device.
contributions: Implemented a UI framework that hooks directly into local AI runtimes (Ollama) for fully private inference.
Delivered a cloud-like UX with conversation tracking and configurable model settings.
Built a minimal, product-grade interface focused on a privacy-driven architecture.

contact.message: Available for opportunities, collaborations, and conversations.
